Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer and wallet performs initial issuance; Issuer management API is called to revoke the credential entry
Data:
- Credential offer deeplink
- DPoP binding key
- Initial access token and refresh token
- Credential management ID
- REVOKED status update (via signed JWT)
Expected Result: Initial credentials and refresh token successfully obtained; credential management entry successfully revoked

Action: Wallet requests new nonce and prepares token refresh request with valid DPoP proof and refresh token
Data:
- Token endpoint URI
- Refresh token
- DPoP binding key
- Nonce from server
- Valid DPoP proof
Expected Result: Valid token refresh request prepared with correct binding and signatures

Action: Wallet sends token refresh request to issuer with refresh token and valid DPoP proof (but credential management is revoked)
Data:
- Refresh token (now invalid due to revoked management)
- Valid DPoP proof
- Token endpoint request
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 400 with error code 'INVALID_TOKEN' and description 'Invalid refresh token'
